question_html:
Change the text into indirect.

“I have to go now,” noticing the time, he says to her.
options_html: Noticing the time, he said to her that he had to go then.
Noticing the time, he said to her that he had to go now.
Noticing the time, he says to her that he have to go then.
Noticing the time, he says to her that he has to go now.
correct_answer_html: Noticing the time, he says to her that he has to go now.
solution_html: এখানে যেহেতু reporting verb-present tense এ রয়েছে তাই, Narration এর নিয়মানুযায়ী reported speech কে indirect করার সময় tense এর কোনো পরিবর্তন হবে না।

question_html:
Which one is the correct indirect narration of the following sentence?

He said to me, “Why have you beaten my dog?”
options_html: He demanded me why had I beated his dog.
He asked me why I have had beaten his dog.
He enquired me why had I had beaten his dog.
He demanded of me why I had beaten his dog.
correct_answer_html: He demanded of me why I had beaten his dog.
solution_html: Direct Speech এর why have you...., পরিবর্তন হয়ে indirect speech-এ Why I had... হবে। He demanded of me why I had beaten his dog.

question_html: Do it as I say. The passive voice is-
options_html: Let it done as I say.
Let it be done as is said by me.
It should be done as I say.
Be it done as it is said.
correct_answer_html: Let it be done as is said by me.
solution_html: complex sentence এর passive করার ক্ষেত্রে দুটি clause এরই আলাদা আলাদা passive করতে হয়। এখানে অপশন (b) তেই শুধু principal clause টি imperative sentence অনুযায়ী passive করা হয়েছে এবং subordinate clause ও passive করা হয়েছে।

question_html: Choose the correct passive form: I know that he did the work.
options_html: It was known to me that the work was done by him.
It is known to me that the work was done by him.
It is known to me that the work has been done by him.
It was known to me that the work had been done by him.
correct_answer_html: It is known to me that the work was done by him.
solution_html: এখানে প্রদত্ত active sentence টি যেহেতু একটি complex sentence তাই, that দ্বারা যুক্ত উভয় clause কেই passive করতে হবে। ফলে সঠিক উত্তরটি হলো: It is known to me that the work was done by him.

question_html: Choose the correct sentence.
options_html: She walks rarely his dog.
We were last week in london.
solution_html:
She rarely walks her dog.

We were in london last week.

My father alwalys goes fishing.

question_html: Change to compound: “Despite being worn out, he completed the task.”
options_html: He was worn out, but he completed the task.
He completed the task and was worn out.
He completed the task despite being worn out.
He was worn out when he completed the task.
correct_answer_html: He was worn out, but he completed the task.
solution_html: Simple sentence -এ ‘In spite of/Despite’ থাকলে Compound sentence -এ ‘but’ হয়।

question_html: Change to complex: “He was too afraid to call his manager.”
options_html: He is so afraid that he could not call his manager.
He was afraid, and he could not call his manager.
He was so afraid that he could not call his manager.
He is afraid to the extent that he could not call his manager.
correct_answer_html: He was so afraid that he could not call his manager.
solution_html: Simple-এ to _____too থাকলে Complex-এ so_____ that + sub + tense অনুযায়ী can/could not + ext বসে।

question_html: Identify the type of the sentence: “I came to study in the UK because I wanted to improve my English, so I talk to as many English people as possible.”
solution_html: যে বাক্যে sub ordinate clause এবং coordinate clause দুইটাই থাকে তাকে Compound-Complex sentence বলে।

question_html: “Besides being a brilliant student, she is a social worker.” Which type of sentence is this?
solution_html: একটি ‍simple sentence- এর বৈশিষ্ট্য হলো একটি subject ও একটি finite verb থাকে, পক্ষান্তরে complex sentence -এ সর্বনিম্ন দুটি sub ও finite verb থাকে এবং একটি/একাধিক subordinating conjunction থাকে।

question_html: Identify the correct sentence.
options_html: Whom do you think wrote to me yesterday?
Who do you think wrote to me yesterday?
Who do you think has written to me yesterday?
Who did you think write to me yesterday?
correct_answer_html: Who do you think wrote to me yesterday?

question_html: Choose the correct answer.
options_html: The two parties have different views to democracy.
The two parties has different views of democracy.
The two parties have different views of democracy.
The two parties differing on democracy.
correct_answer_html: The two parties have different views of democracy.
solution_html: এখানে sentence গুলোর অর্থানুযায়ী different views of শব্দগুচ্ছটি সঠিক। তাই, সঠিক উত্তরটি হলো- The two parties have different views of democracy.

question_html: Find out the correct sentence:
options_html: No other friend I have ever got is as good as he.
I have ever got another friend as good as him.
No other friend I have got as good as him.
I have never got a friend as good as him.
correct_answer_html: No other friend I have ever got is as good as he.

question_html: The previous tenants were ____ for not paying on time.
solution_html: Evicted-উচ্ছেদ বা উৎপাটিত করা।

question_html: Bangladesh has been one of the ____ in formulating and implementing a National Drug Policy in the face of the massively powerful and ______ global pharmaceutical industry.
solution_html: Pioneer অগ্রদূত বা গবেষণায় কোনো একটি ক্ষেত্রে কোনো কিছু প্রথম সূচনাকারী। Lucrative- লাভজনক।

question_html: My father forbade me____.
options_html: not to have association with bad boys
not to keep association with bad boys
to keep association with bad boys
to not keep association with bad boys
correct_answer_html: to keep association with bad boys
solution_html: বাক্যটির অর্থ হবে- Forbid to do অর্থাৎ কাউকে কোনো কিছু করতে নিষেধ/বারণ করা। উল্লেখ্য, forbid শব্দের মধ্যে not শব্দটি বিদ্যমান। forbid এর সাথে not ব্যবহার করা redundancy (বাহুল্য)।

question_html: ______ since I was ten.
options_html: Had I known the vagabond

question_html: Elma often walks past the building. Here “past” is an example of–
solution_html: ‘the building’ noun phrase এর পূর্বে past শব্দটি preposition হিসেবে বসেছে। কারণ সর্বদা preposition এর পর noun equivalent বসে।

question_html: The word ‘near’ can be used as–
solution_html:
near (adjective): He is a near relative.

near (adverb.): Don’t come near.

near (preposition.): His house is near the park.

question_html: Our neighbor went to the medical center after _____on the hand by a hot pan.
By the time the teacher arrived, the student______breakfast.
solution_html: অতীতের দুটি কাজের মধ্যে যেটি আগে ঘটে সেটি Past Perfect Tense হয়; আর যেটি অপেক্ষাকৃত পরে সংঘটিত হবে তা Past Indefinite Tense এ হয়।

question_html: The police stopped the group from ____the abandoned site.
solution_html: preposition এর পর v+ing হয়। তাই from (preposition) এর পর সঠিক উত্তর visiting।

question_html: Had she more free time, she ______the world.
solution_html: প্রদত্ত বাক্যটি 2nd Conditional-এ আছে। তাই, ২য় Clause টিতে sub+would+verb এর base form হয়েছে।

question_html: Unless you ______ your homework, the teacher will punish you.
solution_html: Sentence এর প্রথম অংশে Present indefinite থাকলে পরের অংশে future indefinite tense হয়।

question_html: Choose the synonym of ‘Meticulous’.
solution_html: meticulous অর্থ being very precise যা ‘exact’ এর ‍synonym. অন্যদিকে careless অর্থ যত্নহীন, Bold অর্থ সাহসী এবং ordinary অর্থ সাধারণ। তাই সঠিক উত্তর হবে Exact.

question_html: Which of the following is not an incorrect synonym of the word “indifferent”?
Find the synonym of ‘Arduous’.
solution_html: Arduous অর্থ কষ্টসাধ্য। Difficult শব্দের অর্থও কষ্টসাধ্য। অন্যদিকে Easy শব্দের অর্থ সহজ, Trivial অর্থ “তুচ্ছ”। সুতরাং Arduous এর সঠিক synonym হবে Difficult.

question_html: The expression “fits and starts” refers to
What does the phrase “a blessing in disguise” imply?
options_html: A bad situation with a hidden advantage
correct_answer_html: A bad situation with a hidden advantage

question_html: Because of falling orders, the company has been forced to ________ several hundred workers.
solution_html:
Lisp off: ভুলভাবে কথা বলা অথবা বাচ্চাদের মতো করে কথা বলা।

Lay off: অর্থনৈতিক সমস্যার কারণে কর্মী ছাটাই করা।

Lay on: সরবরাহ করা বা আরোপ করা।

Lie on: কাউকে প্রভাবিত করা।

question_html: If you are to save money, it is wise to _______ clothing rather than food.
solution_html: Cut down on- পরিমাণে কমানো।

question_html: Identify the figure of speech in the sentence: “The rain hammered against the doors.”
solution_html: আমরা জানি, যদি কোনো বাক্য বা উক্তি দ্বারা নিষ্প্রাণ বস্তুগত ধারণাকে জীবন্ত ব্যক্তির ন্যায় বিবেচনা করা হয়, তবে তাকে Personification বলে। এখানে rain কে মানুষের বৈশিষ্ট্যর মত করে উপস্থাপন করা হয়েছে বিধায় এটি একটি Personification.

question_html: “He is as brave as a lion.” Which figure of speech is used here?
solution_html: as অথবা like দিয়ে দুটি জিনিসের তুলনা করা হলে সেটিকে ‘simile’ বলে।

question_html: He has a little time,_____?
solution_html: a little এর ক্ষেত্রে tag negative হয়।

question_html: Nobody phoned you,_____?
solution_html: বাক্যটি negative এবং past indefinite tense-এ থাকায় এর tag হলো did they।

question_html: Identify the clause: “Although he was tired, he kept working.”
solution_html: Contrast বা বৈপরীত্য বোঝাতে→ Adverbial Clause. Though, although, if, when, etc. যুক্ত dependent clause টি সাধারণত Adverb clause হয়।

question_html: Identify the underlined phrase: “The book on the table is mine.”
solution_html: যে phrase noun কে modify করে তাকে adjective phrase বলে। এই বাক্যে underlined phrase The book কে modify করে যা একটি noun।

question_html: Identify the correct sentence.
options_html: She had faith in and hopes for the future.
She had faith and hopes for the future.
She had faith and hopes in the future.
She had faith and hopes in future.
correct_answer_html: She had faith in and hopes for the future.
solution_html: Faith in বিশ্বাস রাখা এবং hope for- আশা করা।

question_html: The bird’s nest made of straw and twigs could not hold much knowledge. ________, the first thing needed was a proper cage.
solution_html: ফলাফল বুঝাতে, Therefore (অতএব) বসে।

question_html: Select the correctly spelled word.
solution_html: সঠিক বানান: Orientation, procrastination, manifestation.

question_html: The verb form of ‘strong’
The facilities of the older school_____.
options_html: is as good or better than the new school
are as good or better than the new school
are as good as or better than those of the new school
are as good as or better than the new school
correct_answer_html: are as good as or better than those of the new school
solution_html: “The facilities of the older school are as good as or better than those of the new school” বাক্যটি সঠিক কারণ এখানে পুরনো স্কুল এর facilities এর সাথে নতুন স্কুল এর facilities এর তুলনা করায় pronoun হিসেবে ‘those’ ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question_html: The new model of the phone has ________ the old one.
solution_html: “The same ... as” structure টি ২টি বিষয়ের মধ্যে সঠিক comparison বোঝাতে ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question_html: The behaviour of our politicians does not accord ____their stated principles.
solution_html: Accord with- সামঞ্জস্যপূর্ণ।

question_html: We opted_____ a reconciliation_____ the dispute.
solution_html: Opt for- কোনো কিছু বেছে নেওয়া। যেহেতু, বিতর্কের একটি সমাধান, অর্থে a reconciliation to the dispute ব্যবহৃত হয়। Reconciliation to (something)- মিমাংসা। তাই for ..... to হলো সঠিক উত্তর।

question_html: ______ father in him arose to see _____ child.
Which of the following words is in singular form?
solution_html: Plural of referendum is referenda.

question_html: Wince: Pain::
solution_html: Wince শব্দটির অর্থ ব্যথা প্রদর্শন করা এবং pain শব্দটির অর্থও ব্যথা।

question_html: Only____of these are truly problematic; the rest are easily adjustable.
solution_html: Plural countable noun/pronoun এর পূর্বে Plural determiner (few, a few) বসে। যখন বাক্যটি positive অর্থ দেয় তখন Determiner হিসেবে few না বসে a few বসে।

question_html: Identify the incorrect word/phrase in the following: While most people would not think of starting a garden on their roofs, human beings have been planting gardens on rooftops for thousand of years.
solution_html: অগণিত বছর বোঝাতে thousand এর সাথে ‘s’ যুক্ত হবে।

question_html: Translate the following sentence into English: “নার্স আমাকে বলেছিল যে, ডাক্তারের কার্যালয় বিকেল ৫ টায় বন্ধ হয়।”
options_html: The nurse told me that the doctor’s office closed at 5:00 P.M.
The nurse told me that the doctor’s office had closed at 5:00 P.M.
The nurse told me that the doctor’s office closes at 5:00 P.M.
The nurse had told me that the doctor’s office had closed at 5:00 P.M.
correct_answer_html: The nurse told me that the doctor’s office closes at 5:00 P.M.

question_html: A person who looks to the bright side of life–
Select the sentence where “present” functions as an adjective:
options_html: She is going to present her findings at the conference.
He received a beautiful present on his graduation.
All the students who were present signed the attendance sheet.
The CEO will present the new project next week.
correct_answer_html: All the students who were present signed the attendance sheet.
solution_html: এখানে ‘Present’ students এর অবস্থা প্রকাশ বসেছে। তাই ‘Present’ এখানে adjective তোমরা জানো যে Linking verb ‘Be’ এর পর Adjective বসে।

question_html: Never before _______such a magical atmosphere filling every corner of the old city.
solution_html: Inversion- এর নিয়মে never থাকায় have verb টি subject ‘they’ এর আগে বসেছে।

question_html: Identify the correct sentence.
options_html: While walking in the park, the flowers were looked at by us.
After finishing the assignment, she put away the laptop.
After completing the work, the building looks perfect.
After seeing the movie, the book was read by her.
correct_answer_html: After finishing the assignment, she put away the laptop.
solution_html: “After finishing the assignment, she put away the laptop” Dangling modifier সর্বদা noun/pronoun এর পূর্বে বসে, সেই noun/pronun কে modify করে। তাই, এখানে “after finishing the assignment”, she Pronoun কে modify করছে।

question_html: Identify the underlined part in the sentence: “The broken vase was carefully repaired.”
solution_html: এখানে broken শব্দটি break-verb এর past participle থেকে উৎপন্ন হয়ে adj. এর মতো কাজ করছে। তাই, broken-এখানে past participle হিসেবে উত্তর নেওয়া হয়েছে।

question_html: They left without saying goodbye. Here ‘saying’ is a/an–
solution_html: Preposition+noun। এখানে without prep এরপর say-verb এর সাথে ing যুক্ত হয়ে gerund গঠিত হয়ে noun এর মতো কাজ করছে।

question_html: Choose the correctly spelled word:
solution_html: Sovereignty, Beneficial, definitely.

question_html: Choose the correct sentence.
options_html: The boy was short who snatched my handbag.
The boy snatched my handbag who was short.
The boy who snathed my handbag was short.
The boy was short who was snatching my handbag.
correct_answer_html: The boy who snathed my handbag was short.
solution_html: সর্বদা antecedent এর পরেই relative pronoun হয়ে থাকে বিধায়, “The boy who snatched my handbag was short” বাক্যটি সঠিক উত্তর।

question_html: Choose the correct causative sentence:
options_html: She gets her brother to clean the room.
She is get cleaned the room.
She is cleaning the room herself.
correct_answer_html: She gets her brother to clean the room.
solution_html: Causitive verb ‘get’ এর ক্ষেত্রে, structure: Sub+get+action doer+infinitive। তাই সঠিক উত্তর হলো- ‘she gets her brother to clean the room’.

question_html: Dr. Mary Edwards Walker was a surgeon, soldier, ____ fighter for women’s right.
solution_html: এখানে parallel structure এর নিয়মানুযায়ী বাক্যে সকল noun গুলো parallel করতে and ব্যবহার করা হয়েছে। তাই, সঠিক উত্তর হলো and।
